subcodes.first_line: It is wonderful, priceless boon to be a vessel carrying food from God. It cannot be bought with gold. The first condition of a religious teacher
subcodes.subjects: @words vs deeds, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @pure intentions in teaching the Cause, @high station of teachers of the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline
